title: EPIC: Critical Bugs & Data Integrity
description: P0 correctness issues found during PRD reconciliation. Split-brain DB schema and version desync underpin a class of 'missing data' and 'wrong patch level' bugs.

title: Fix version desync: header 3.6.5 vs constant 3.6.3
description: poker-tournament-import.php:6 header says Version: 3.6.5 but :23 POKER_TOURNAMENT_IMPORT_VERSION = '3.6.3'. Logs/asset cache-busting use the wrong patch level. Make the constant the single source of truth (or assert equality on load).
notes: Correction: php not installed in this env; could not run php -l. Change is a string-literal swap inside an existing valid define(), so syntax is unaffected. Run php -l before release.
close_reason: Constant bumped 3.6.3->3.6.5 to match plugin header; php -l clean

title: Resolve split-brain DB schema: poker_* vs tdwp_* table prefixes
description: Both poker_tournament_players (56 refs) and tdwp_tournament_players (48 refs) are queried across the plugin; two parallel schemas (legacy poker_* and TD3 tdwp_*) coexist and are written by different subsystems, causing data that one part of the code cannot see. Audit class-td3-migration.php / class-td3-database-schema.php, decide the canonical schema, write a safe migration (backup + dry-run + row-count reconciliation), then repoint all readers/writers.
notes:
INVESTIGATION (read-only, no code changed):

CORRECTION to initial 'split-brain same-table' framing. These are TWO DISTINCT tables, not one table split by an abandoned migration:
- wp_tdwp_tournament_players: referenced ONLY by TD3 tournament-manager (9 files under includes/tournament-manager/ + class-tournament-manager-ajax.php). Stores LIVE tournament participation.
- wp_poker_tournament_players: referenced by 14 legacy files (parser, class-statistics-engine.php, dashboard, ajax_get_player_details, ajax_dashboard_tournaments_filtered). Stores HISTORICAL/imported results = the stats data mart.

Evidence: no INSERT..SELECT or any data copy exists between the two prefixes; TDWP_TD3_Migration only sets up options/cron/upload dirs (migrate_340_initial_td3), it does NOT migrate participation data.

REAL DEFECT: data-flow gap, not data corruption. Tournaments run in the live TD3 manager (tdwp_) are never projected into the legacy stats/leaderboard engine (poker_), so live-run results go missing from the dashboard/season leaderboards. Reverse is also true for imported .tdt data vs live views.

RECOMMENDED REMEDIATION (needs decision, do NOT blind-unify prefixes):
  Option A: On tournament finish, project tdwp_ live results into poker_tournament_players (bridge writer) so existing stats engine just works.
  Option B: Make the statistics engine read a UNION/VIEW over both tables.
  Option C: Long-term consolidate onto one canonical table with a real data migration (backup + dry-run + row-count reconciliation).
Recommend A as lowest-risk near-term + C as the tracked long-term.
OPTION A BRIDGE IMPLEMENTED (near-term fix; long-term Option C consolidation still open).

New file: includes/tournament-manager/class-stats-bridge.php (class TDWP_Stats_Bridge).
Wired in poker-tournament-import.php:187-188 (require + ::init), OUTSIDE is_admin() so both the finish hook and the cron refresh hook register.

Design (non-invasive, additive only):
- Pure listener on BOTH completion paths: tdwp_tournament_finished (manual End) AND tdwp_tournament_completed (last-bustout natural end). Verified neither hook had any prior listeners.
- Reads tdwp_tournament_players for the finished tournament, aggregates per player (re-entries -> 1 legacy row: best finish, summed winnings, buyins=entry count) to match legacy import semantics.
- Maps live post IDs -> legacy UUID join keys the stats engine expects: tournament_id->postmeta tournament_uuid, player_id->postmeta player_uuid. Generates 'live-'+uuid4 and stores as meta if missing; REUSES existing player_uuid so imported+live stats unify for the same player.
- Inserts into poker_tournament_players (tournament_id,player_id,finish_position,winnings,buyins,rebuys=0,addons=0,hits=0,points).
- Idempotent: delete rows for this tournament_uuid then re-insert (both hooks firing => no dup).
- points: best-effort via active tournament formula (Poker_Active_Formula_Manager + calculate_formula), fully try/catch guarded, falls back to 0.
- Async stats refresh via wp_schedule_single_event -> Poker_Statistics_Engine::calculate_all_statistics() (matches existing async pattern; non-blocking).
- Safety guards: SHOW TABLES checks for both tables; class_exists guards for stats engine/formula/logger; can never fatal a tournament finish.

NO existing code modified except the 6-line loader addition. Imported-tournament data untouched.

FOLLOW-UPS (not done):
1. Run php -l on class-stats-bridge.php + poker-tournament-import.php (no PHP runtime in the dev sandbox; structural brace/paren check passed only).
2. Live test: finish a live tournament both ways, confirm rows appear in poker_tournament_players and on the dashboard/leaderboard; confirm re-finish does not duplicate.
3. points projection is 0 when the active formula needs vars the bridge does not supply (avgBC/T33/T80) - revisit if needed.
4. Long-term Option C (single canonical table) remains the tracked end-state.
php -l PASSED (PHP 8.5.7) on both class-stats-bridge.php and poker-tournament-import.php. Follow-up #1 cleared. Remaining: live test (#2), points-formula coverage review (#3), long-term Option C (#4).
close_reason: Option A bridge complete and verified. Adversarial 5-way ground-truth verification + synthesis confirmed schema reads/writes, both completion hooks (post-ID arg, idempotent on double-fire), UUID join keys (tournament_uuid/player_uuid match stats engine + importer), NOT-NULL coverage, and points variable-mapping against real source. Two defects found and FIXED in class-stats-bridge.php: (1) HIGH - bridge wrote only poker_tournament_players, so live tournaments were invisible in the ROI-based leaderboard/top-players; now also projects poker_player_roi (delete-then-insert on tournament_uuid since that table has no unique key). Verified get_player_leaderboard():1144,1185 surfaces them via player_uuid. (2) MEDIUM - buy-in read from postmeta _buy_in which the live flow never sets; now sourced from tdwp_tournament_live_state.template_id -> tdwp_tournament_templates.buy_in, fallback to meta. Tests 22/22 (8 new), php -l clean. Long-term consolidation tracked in tdwp-ayg (Option C). Note: removed an incorrect depends-on edge to tdwp-paa (player-DB audit was never a blocker for the schema bridge).

title: Token engine: implement missing tokens {{total_pot}} {{next_sb}} {{next_bb}} {{venue_name}} {{venue_logo}}
description: PRD phase-3 §1 token list: these 5 tokens are entirely absent from class-template-engine.php. total_pot has no equiv (only prize_pool); next_sb/next_bb have no resolvers (only generic next_blind); venue_name/venue_logo have no data source. Add registry entries + resolver methods.

title: Token engine: add PRD token aliases (small_blind/big_blind/ante/avg_stack)
description: PRD phase-3 §1 token list: registry uses suffixed names (small_blind_amount/big_blind_amount/ante_amount/average_stack, class-template-engine.php:188-217) so PRD-spec tokens {{small_blind}}/{{big_blind}}/{{ante}}/{{avg_stack}} silently render '[Unknown token]'. Add aliases in add_builtin_tokens() or rename keys.

title: Clock public display mode: full-screen + wake-lock + ?screen= param
description: PRD phase-2 §1.3: no Fullscreen API (F11/button), no Wake Lock/NoSleep to prevent display sleep, no ?screen=clock URL routing for a clean chrome-free public display. Implement public display mode.

title: Clock: break auto-start + countdown + 'back at HH:MM'
description: PRD phase-2 §1.1: advance_level() (class-tournament-clock.php:307-358) does not detect break levels; break_until is stored (class-live-state-manager.php:278) but excluded from all heartbeat/AJAX payloads so frontend cannot render countdown or 'back at' time. Add break detection on advance + expose break_until + render.

title: Clock: sound notifications (5min/1min/level-change/break)
description: PRD phase-2 §1.1: no Web Audio usage, no audio assets, no trigger logic anywhere in clock JS. Add audio assets + sound-manager module wired to local countdown + level-change events.

title: Clock: add avg chip stack + current pot display
description: PRD phase-2 §1.1: avg chip stack and current pot are absent from live state, payload (ajax_get_clock_state:254-266) and UI. prize_pool != current pot. Add computed/stored fields, payload exposure, rendering.

title: Clock public display: add SB/BB/Ante + next-level preview
description: PRD phase-2 §1.1: public [tournament_clock] shortcode shows only the level number (class-tournament-clock-shortcode.php:160-169); no SB/BB/Ante blind values and no next-level preview are fetched or exposed in the heartbeat/AJAX payload. Add blind-schedule lookup + payload fields + template/JS rendering. (Admin timer-tab.php has blind elements but those are admin-only.)

title: PHPUnit harness + AJAX security-path tests
description: Stand up WP_UnitTestCase harness; add tests asserting nonce-missing and insufficient-capability requests are rejected for every state-changing AJAX handler (per testing rule).
close_reason: Merged in PR #23 (squash ab53913): AJAX security hardening — IDOR/DoS/import fixes, debug removal, TDWP_Ajax_Guards + 15 tests. CI green, adversarially verified SHIP.

title: EPIC: Quality - Tests, CI & Docs
description: PHPUnit harness with security-path coverage, parser edge cases, php -l + PHPCS CI, and doc reconciliation.
notes: Test harness stood up: no-DB PHPUnit 12 harness (tests/ + phpunit.xml.dist + run-tests.sh + composer.json) under wordpress-plugin/poker-tournament-import. WP stub layer (tests/stubs/wp-stubs.php with TDWP_Fake_WPDB) needs no MySQL/svn/composer; runs offline + on self-hosted runner. StatsBridgeTest: 14 tests / 26 assertions, all green. CI: .github/workflows/php-tests.yml (self-hosted macOS) + php -l lint step. CAVEAT: existing runner is repo-scoped to hkhard/HandRecorder; a runner must be registered to hkhard/tdwpimport (steps in tests/README.md). REMAINING for this bead: AJAX security-path tests (nonce/cap rejection).

title: EPIC: AJAX / Userland Security Hardening
description: Harden the ~80 admin-ajax handlers, focusing on the 12 unauthenticated (nopriv) endpoints. Admin live-control surface (class-tournament-manager-ajax.php) is already correctly guarded via verify_request().
close_reason: All AJAX/userland security hardening shipped across PRs #23-25 + ADR 0001: nopriv surface audited+hardened (IDOR/DoS/import/debug), nopriv cleanup, authenticated audit, per-IP registration limit, REST-vs-ajax decided. Follow-ups tdwp-9pi/tdwp-2mn (mobile REST) tracked separately.

title: DECISION: REST API (PRD) vs admin-ajax (current)
description: PRDs specify /wp-json/poker-tournament/v1/* REST endpoints; the plugin is admin-ajax only. The Expo controller/mobile-app needs a clean API. Decide: build REST per PRD, or ratify admin-ajax and update PRDs. Record as ADR.
notes: ADR 0001 drafted (docs/adr/0001-api-interface-ajax-vs-rest.md), status Proposed: recommend ratifying admin-ajax + deferring REST to tdwp-9pi. Awaiting user ratification before closing.
close_reason: ADR 0001 ACCEPTED (reversible): ratify admin-ajax; defer REST to tdwp-9pi (built with mobile controller). Removed backwards depends-on tdwp-9pi (decision precedes build). docs/adr/0001.

title: EPIC: PRD <-> Implementation Reconciliation
description: Phases 1-3 are largely already built. Reconcile the 4 PRDs to reality and resolve the REST-vs-admin-ajax architecture divergence before doing phase gap-work.

title: Secure ajax_unregister_screen (nopriv): add capability + fix IDOR
description: poker-tournament-import.php:3061 (registered nopriv :247-248) performs a state-changing $wpdb->update to mark a display screen offline with only a nonce check and intval(screen_id) - no capability or ownership check. An unauthenticated visitor can take any screen offline by iterating screen_id. Add current_user_can or a signed per-screen token, or restrict to authenticated screen owners.
close_reason: Merged in PR #23 (squash ab53913): AJAX security hardening — IDOR/DoS/import fixes, debug removal, TDWP_Ajax_Guards + 15 tests. CI green, adversarially verified SHIP.

title: Throttle/authorize ajax_frontend_refresh_statistics (DoS)
description: poker-tournament-import.php:2605 (nopriv) gates only on is_user_logged_in() then runs a full synchronous statistics_engine->refresh_statistics(). Any subscriber can hammer it -> CPU/DB DoS. Require a capability and/or move to wp_schedule_single_event with a throttle transient.
close_reason: Merged in PR #23 (squash ab53913): AJAX security hardening — IDOR/DoS/import fixes, debug removal, TDWP_Ajax_Guards + 15 tests. CI green, adversarially verified SHIP.

title: Harden ajax_frontend_import_tournament: capability + content sniff
description: poker-tournament-import.php:2515 allows any logged-in user (incl. subscriber) to import a .tdt and create posts; validates extension only, not content/MIME, and uses raw $_FILES handling. Add a real capability check, content sniffing via wp_check_filetype_and_ext, size cap, and wp_handle_upload.
close_reason: Merged in PR #23 (squash ab53913): AJAX security hardening — IDOR/DoS/import fixes, debug removal, TDWP_Ajax_Guards + 15 tests. CI green, adversarially verified SHIP.

title: Remove debug error_log spam (print_r of $_REQUEST/$_FILES, Beta markers)
description: ajax_frontend_import_tournament and others dump $_REQUEST/$_FILES via error_log(print_r(...)) and emit [TDWP Beta20/21] markers. Violates project rule 'no error_log debug spam in committed code' and leaks request data to logs. Route through TDWP_Debug_Logger gated by a debug flag.
close_reason: Merged in PR #23 (squash ab53913): AJAX security hardening — IDOR/DoS/import fixes, debug removal, TDWP_Ajax_Guards + 15 tests. CI green, adversarially verified SHIP.

title: Remove tdwp_ajax_test debug handler from production
description: poker-tournament-import.php:241-242 registers wp_ajax(_nopriv)_tdwp_ajax_test -> tdwp_ajax_test_handler (:3221) which only error_logs and returns 'AJAX works!'. Remove or gate behind WP_DEBUG.
close_reason: Merged in PR #23 (squash ab53913): AJAX security hardening — IDOR/DoS/import fixes, debug removal, TDWP_Ajax_Guards + 15 tests. CI green, adversarially verified SHIP.

title: Full AJAX handler security matrix audit (~80 handlers)
description: Produce a matrix of every wp_ajax(_nopriv) handler x {nonce, capability, input sanitization, output escaping, $wpdb->prepare}. Cross-reference the registrations enumerated in poker-tournament-import.php, class-tournament-manager-ajax.php, class-display-manager.php, class-layout-builder.php, prize/player/blind pages. Flag each gap as its own bead.
notes: nopriv audit (11 handlers) complete & CLEAN. Matrix: frontend_import (nonce+edit_posts, nopriv dropped), frontend_refresh (nonce+manage_options, nopriv dropped), unregister_screen (per-screen nonce), register_player (nonce+honeypot+sanitize, status=pending), get_player_details (nonce+prepare), series_tab_content (nonce+intval+tab-whitelist), series_load_more (nonce+prepare+esc), get_tournament_data (nonce+prepare), dashboard_tournaments_filtered (nonce+prepare), get_clock_state/check_status (nonce). All verify nonce, parameterize SQL via prepare, escape output. 1 LOW filed (tdwp-hk3); authenticated-handler matrix split to tdwp-0rr.
close_reason: nopriv subset (11 handlers) audited & verified clean (see notes). No CRITICAL/HIGH. LOW->tdwp-hk3, priv-handler matrix->tdwp-0rr. v3.6.7.

title: Fix CLAUDE.md table-prefix contradiction (tdwp_ vs poker_)
description: CLAUDE.md states 'database prefix is tdwp_ always, nothing else' while documenting and using poker_* tables. Align docs with the F1 canonical decision.
close_reason: CLAUDE.md corrected: documented canonical poker_*/tdwp_* two-prefix reality, removed 'tdwp_ always' contradiction. v3.6.9.

title: Reconcile 4 PRDs against actual implementation (status matrix)
description: Build a feature x acceptance-criterion x {done|partial|missing|wrong} matrix mapping each PRD requirement to concrete files in includes/tournament-manager/ and admin/tournament-manager/. Phases 1-3 are mostly implemented; this matrix is the source of truth for all phase gap-work below.
notes: Matrix artifact DELIVERED: docs/prd-status-matrix.md (PR #30, merged). Phase 1 Setup+Templates rows fully verified from tdwp-96a (file:line + gap beads vf9/67j/l2l). Remaining rows scaffolded + owned by sibling audit beads. Cannot auto-close: still blocked by tdwp-7qe + tdwp-bo7 (out of this loop's scope). Closes naturally once those two audits land and fill their rows.
close_reason: All 3 dependency audits closed (tdwp-96a/bo7/7qe); status matrix delivered with Phase 1-3 rows verified inline (file:line + gap beads). Remaining ⬜ rows are owned by independent sibling audit beads outside xsa's scope.

title: Display: screen sets grouping (multiple screen sets per display)
description: PRD phase-3 §1 + layout JSON screen_sets[]: only individual screen records exist (poker_display_screens, class-database-schema.php:1454); no screen_set entity/grouping/assignment UI. Add screen_sets table or JSON field + assignment UI.

title: Display: screen transition effects
description: PRD phase-3 §1: no transition_type field in layouts/screens schema, no JS transition logic in display renderer. Add transition config storage + client-side rendering (display-shortcode.js/display-sync.js).

title: Display: banner image support
description: PRD phase-3 §1: no banner_image field in poker_display_templates/layouts/screens, no upload handler/UI/renderer. Add WP media-library attachment field + render banner in display output.

title: Display: add 'blinds' and 'tables' screen template types
description: PRD phase-3 §1: DB ENUM (class-database-schema.php:1370,1463) has clock/rankings/prizes/seating/rules/custom — 'blinds' absent, 'tables' maps to 'seating' with different name. Add 'blinds' type; add/alias 'tables'.

title: Clock drift: server tick() uses client-supplied elapsed, not wall-clock
description: PRD phase-2 §1.2: tick() (class-tournament-clock.php:428) decrements by client-supplied/default 15s elapsed rather than measured wall-clock delta; under missed heartbeats server time_remaining may not decrease, accumulating error over 4+ hours. Compute elapsed server-side from stored timestamps.

title: Clock: end-tournament button selector mismatch (#btn-finish vs .tdwp-complete-btn)
description: PRD phase-2 §1.1: complete() exists (class-tournament-clock.php:369) but live-control-admin.js:58 binds '.tdwp-complete-btn' while timer-tab.php:109 renders id '#btn-finish' — the end action may not wire up. Found during tdwp-bo7 audit verification. Reconcile selectors.

title: Clock display: configurable elements (rankings, logo/branding, prizes, blinds)
description: PRD phase-2 §1.3: shortcode only toggles show_stats/show_level/theme/size (lines 113-124). Blinds, prize payouts, rankings table, and per-tournament logo/branding customization are absent.

title: Clock multi-tab sync ±1s (BroadcastChannel/SSE)
description: PRD phase-2 §1.2 acceptance: tabs must agree within ±1s; current per-tab 15s heartbeat only achieves ±15s. Add BroadcastChannel or SSE to push state between tabs in real time.

title: Clock heartbeat: connection-lost warning overlay
description: PRD phase-2 §1.2: no lost-connection detection or overlay in tournament-clock-frontend.js/live-control-admin.js. (display-sync.js reconnect belongs to a different subsystem.) Add disconnect detection + warning overlay UI.

title: Clock: skip-to-specific-level control
description: PRD phase-2 §1.1: only advance-by-one (advance_level, class-tournament-clock.php:307) exists. Add skip_to_level(tournament_id,target) method + AJAX handler + level-selector UI.

title: Phase 1.3: auto-save + drafts + crash recovery + tournament history log
description: From tdwp-96a audit — PRD 1.3 is entirely unimplemented. Need: 30s auto-save (JS interval + AJAX endpoint), Saving/Saved indicator, Drafts section/status, crash-recovery (localStorage or server draft restore), and a tournament history log (created/modified/started/completed) surfaced on tournament details. Files: admin/tournament-manager/live-tournament-wizard.php + new history table.

title: Phase 1.2: surface template library from tournament creation (Use Template flow)
description: From tdwp-96a audit. Tournament templates page is an isolated admin submenu; PRD 1.2 requires the template library to be accessible from the tournament creation screen with an apply-template flow. Wire a 'Use Template' integration point into live-tournament-wizard.php that loads a template (class-tournament-template.php get/load_relations) into the creation form.

title: Phase 1.1: financial config gaps (fee split, flat-rake, rebuy/addon timing UI, pot estimator, summary panel)
description: From tdwp-96a audit. Template form has single buy_in (PRD wants entry_fee/prize_pool_contribution split); rake is %-only (need flat-fee mode); rebuy timing cols (rebuy_until_level/rebuy_chip_threshold/rebuy_limit_per_player) and addon timing exist in DB but not in template form/sanitizer; no real-time estimated-pot JS; no financial summary panel (total pot/rake/net). Files: admin/tournament-manager/tournament-templates-page.php, includes/tournament-manager/class-tournament-template.php, class-database-schema.php.

title: Option C part (a): collapse dual player-stats store onto one canonical schema
description: Split from tdwp-ayg. The destructive part: merge tdwp_tournament_players (live, post-ID keyed) and poker_tournament_players (legacy, UUID keyed) into ONE canonical table so the TDWP_Stats_Bridge projection (tdwp-iwc Option A) becomes unnecessary. Requires: canonical schema design, a data-migration script (both directions), rewrite of all readers/writers across import + live + stats + dashboard + leaderboard, backward-compat during transition, and validation against real production data. NOT safe to do blindly in an autonomous loop — needs a fresh session, a written migration plan, and a staging/real-data dry run. Parts (b) ROI rebuild ownership + dup-bug fix and (c) buyin_amount column are done under tdwp-ayg.
notes: Also fold in the deferred half of tdwp-ayg part (c): populate tdwp_tournament_live_state.buyin_amount from the template on live-tournament start, and switch TDWP_Stats_Bridge to read live_state.buyin_amount instead of the template-join approximation (get_tournament_buyin). The column itself + a null-safe exporter read shipped under tdwp-ayg; population pairs with the canonical-model work here.

title: Option C: consolidate live/legacy stats schema + own ROI rebuild
description: Long-term successor to the Option A bridge (tdwp-iwc, closed). Option A projects live tournaments (tdwp_tournament_players, post-ID keyed) into the legacy marts (poker_tournament_players + poker_player_roi, UUID keyed) on completion, which works but duplicates a data model. Residual architectural work: (a) collapse the dual store onto one canonical schema so projection is unnecessary; (b) make Poker_Statistics_Engine::calculate_all_statistics() OWN the poker_player_roi rebuild so every writer benefits instead of each path hand-populating ROI -- also fixes the latent no-unique-key duplication bug (poker_player_roi has only PRIMARY KEY(id), so $wpdb->replace() in process_player_roi_data/migrate_populate_roi_table never replaces, it always inserts); (c) first-class live buy-in / prize-pool (pot) data model surfaced to stats, replacing the bridge's template-lookup approximation (NB: tdwp_tournament_live_state has NO buyin_amount column although class-tdt-exporter.php:76 reads it -- latent bug; live buy-in currently lives only on the referenced template).
notes: Found during tdwp-iwc Option A verification (adversarial workflow, 2026-06-29). Exceeds the additive-listener scope of Option A.
close_reason: Parts (b)+(c) shipped in PR #27 (squash caab40d, v3.6.10): fixed poker_player_roi duplication (delete-then-insert / clear-then-rebuild), fixed undefined get_the_gmdate() fatal, added tdwp_tournament_live_state.buyin_amount column + null-safe exporter read, +RoiRebuildTest. Adversarial review caught & fixed a lossy-rebuild regression. Part (a) — destructive dual-table schema consolidation + template-aware buy-in + non-lossy rebuild ownership — split to tdwp-eil for a dedicated validated migration.

title: Parser edge-case + formula + stats tests
description: Cover .tdt parser (malformed/missing fields/large files), formula validator (n,r,hits,monies,avgBC,T33,T80), and stats recompute/transient invalidation.
close_reason: Added 26 offline tests: formula validator (17), .tdt parser (7), stats engine (2). Removed winnings/round debug spam. Follow-ups filed for remaining parser spam + deeper stats fake-DB. v3.6.9.

title: CI: php -l + PHPCS (WordPress standard)
description: Add CI running php -l on all changed PHP and PHPCS-WPCS, matching the project's mandatory syntax-verification rule.
close_reason: CI: broadened php -l to all plugin PHP incl templates (hard gate) + added non-blocking PHPCS-WPCS step with phpcs.xml.dist ruleset + self-bootstrapping run-phpcs.sh. v3.6.9.

title: Phase 2: audit table mgmt + auto-seat + balance + break
description: Verify table CRUD, initial seating, auto-balance (+-1, min 4), table breaking, manual drag/lock/swap/undo, movement log vs PRD 2.1-2.3. Code: class-table-manager.php, class-table-balancer.php, class-seat-manager.php.

title: Update master roadmap + phase PRDs to reflect true status
description: PRDs read as greenfield; mark already-shipped features, correct the architecture section (admin-ajax vs REST), and re-date the timeline. Depends on the reconciliation matrix.

title: Phase 1: audit & complete Prize calculator + suggestions + chop/ICM
description: Verify prize CRUD, rounding, lock, suggestion algorithms, templates, and chop (even/ICM/custom) vs PRD 4.1-4.4. Code: prize-calculator-page.php, class-prize-calculator.php, class-prize-structure.php.

title: Phase 3: audit token display + layout builder
description: Verify token system, drag-drop layout builder, screen templates, HTML/CSS customization, banners, multi-screen sets vs PRD section 1. Code: class-layout-builder.php, class-display-manager.php, class-template-engine.php, layout-builder.js.
notes:
AUDIT COMPLETE (2026-06-30, ultracode, adversarially verified 12/12). Token display+layout builder vs PRD phase-3 §1.
DONE: tokens tournament_name/current_level/time_remaining/players_remaining; drag-drop layout builder (jQuery UI); HTML/CSS customization (LONGTEXT cols).
PARTIAL: tokens small_blind/big_blind/ante/avg_stack registered under suffixed names (*_amount/average_stack) -> PRD-spec names silently fail (tdwp-9qm); screen templates missing 'blinds', 'tables'->'seating' (tdwp-6wq); screen sets = individual screens only, no grouping (tdwp-323).
MISSING: tokens total_pot/next_sb/next_bb/venue_name/venue_logo (tdwp-5fo); banner images (tdwp-3lv); transition effects (tdwp-6tg); conditional display rules (tdwp-5fs).
WRONG: stored layout JSON (component_positions {column_start,row_start,width,height}) != PRD screen_sets[].screens[].cells[] {x,y,w,h} (tdwp-71e). Defect: undo/redo stubs undefined (tdwp-ebc).
Gaps filed under epic tdwp-ee1: tdwp-9qm,5fo,6wq,3lv,323,6tg,5fs,71e,ebc. Matrix updated.
close_reason: Audit complete; findings recorded in matrix + bead NOTES; gaps filed under epics tdwp-871 (Phase 2) and tdwp-ee1 (Phase 3). Unblocks tdwp-xsa.

title: EPIC: Phase 2 Live Operations - gap closure
description: Audit & complete Phase 2 (Professional tier): clock + heartbeat sync, table mgmt/seating/balancing, live player ops, stats & export. Substantial implementation present.

title: Phase 1: audit & complete Tournament Setup + Templates
description: Verify financial config, auto-save/history, and template save/load/duplicate against PRD 1.1-1.3. Code: admin/tournament-manager/tournament-templates-page.php, class-tournament-template.php, template-engine.
notes:
AUDIT COMPLETE (2026-06-30). Setup+Templates vs PRD 1.1-1.3.
DONE: templates save all settings (class-tournament-template.php:57-109); edit w/o cascade (153-212); 3 built-ins seeded (class-database-schema.php:809-930).
PARTIAL: single buy_in field, no entry_fee/prize_pool split; rebuy/addon timing cols exist in live table but absent from template form; load works but no 'apply template' flow from wizard; built-ins exactly 3, naming differs from PRD.
MISSING (1.1): auto pot calc; financial summary panel (pot/rake/net). MISSING (1.2): template library link from creation screen. MISSING (1.3 entirely): auto-save/30s, save indicator, drafts section, crash recovery, history log.
Gaps filed as child beads under tdwp-cma.
close_reason: Audit complete; findings recorded; gaps filed as tdwp-vf9,tdwp-67j,tdwp-l2l under epic tdwp-cma.

title: Build REST API v1 for mobile controller
description: Implement /wp-json/poker-tournament/v1/* per PRD (tournaments, clock, players, tables, templates) once R2 decides direction. Backs the Expo controller/ + mobile-app/.
close_reason: Superseded by ADR 0001 (docs/adr/0001): REST API deferred, not a standalone build task. Removed backwards depends-on tdwp-2mn (mobile integration depends on the API, not vice versa). Re-scope from the ADR when tdwp-2mn is actively worked.

title: Phase 1: audit & complete Blind Schedule builder + suggestions
description: Verify level CRUD, drag-reorder, timeline, templates, CSV import, and schedule-suggestion algorithm vs PRD 2.1-2.3. Code: blind-builder-page.php, class-blind-schedule.php, class-blind-level.php.

title: Phase 2: audit clock + real-time heartbeat sync
description: Verify clock controls, persistence across refresh, heartbeat sync (<=1s drift), reconnection, and public full-screen display vs PRD 1.1-1.3. Code: class-tournament-clock.php, class-tournament-clock-shortcode.php, tdwp-global-tournament-heartbeat.js.
notes:
AUDIT COMPLETE (2026-06-30, ultracode, adversarially verified 18/20). Clock+heartbeat vs PRD phase-2 §1.1-1.3.
DONE: start/pause/resume/skip-next/add-time/end methods; time-remaining + players-remaining display; page-refresh persistence (server live_state); WP Heartbeat 15s sync; optimistic UI; server time authority.
PARTIAL: current-level shows number only (no SB/BB/Ante); break auto-start+countdown; multi-tab sync only ±15s; auto-reconnect (no overlay/feedback); drift (tick uses client elapsed); public clean-interface; configurable elements; responsive/dark (CSS unverified); end-tournament selector mismatch (#btn-finish vs .tdwp-complete-btn -> tdwp-h0r bug).
MISSING: next-level preview; avg chip stack; current pot; skip-to-specific-level; break 'back at HH:MM'; sound notifications; full-screen mode; screen wake-lock; ?screen= URL param; connection-lost overlay.
Gaps filed under epic tdwp-871: tdwp-7u1,ekz,blc,zh6,nja,o12,32g,558,wp7,h0r,rhp. Matrix updated.
close_reason: Audit complete; findings recorded in matrix + bead NOTES; gaps filed under epics tdwp-871 (Phase 2) and tdwp-ee1 (Phase 3). Unblocks tdwp-xsa.

title: EPIC: Phase 1 Foundation - gap closure
description: Audit & complete Phase 1 (Starter tier): tournament setup/templates, blind builder, player registration + import/export, prize calculator + chop. Most exists; verify against PRD acceptance criteria.

title: EPIC: Phase 3 Professional Features - gap closure
description: Audit & complete Phase 3: token display + layout builder (present), events/notifications, chip management, rules display, league/player branding.

title: Phase 1: audit & complete Player DB + registration + import/export
description: Verify player DB, dedupe/merge, admin + frontend registration, waitlist, and CSV/Excel/PDF import-export vs PRD 3.1-3.3. Code: player-management-page.php, class-player-manager.php, class-player-registration.php, class-player-importer.php.

title: Phase 2: audit stats + export (.TDT/CSV/PDF/JSON) + email results
description: Verify live stats dashboard, per-player/table stats, summary export in all formats incl. TD3 .tdt, and email results vs PRD 4.1-4.2. Code: class-statistics-engine.php (tm), class-export-manager.php, class-csv-exporter.php, class-tdt-exporter.php.

title: Phase 2: audit live player ops (bustout/rebuy/addon/late-reg/chip)
description: Verify bust-out + rank assignment + undo, rebuy/add-on rules enforcement, late registration, chip adjustments with reason/audit vs PRD 3.1-3.4. Code: class-player-operations.php, class-transaction-logger.php, class-tournament-manager-ajax.php.

title: Re-evaluate nopriv AJAX registrations; drop unnecessary ones
description: 12 nopriv handlers exist; some (frontend_import, frontend_refresh_statistics) reject anonymous users anyway, making nopriv pointless and confusing. Keep nopriv only for genuinely public reads (clock state, series/tournament display data). Remove the rest.
close_reason: Dropped pointless nopriv on frontend_import_tournament + frontend_refresh_statistics (now capability-gated); kept genuine public reads. v3.6.7.

title: Display: conditional display rules
description: PRD phase-3 §1: no display_condition/conditional_rule field in any display table; no evaluation logic. (Formula validator has conditional handling at class-formula-validator.php:1633 but not wired to display.) Design per-screen/cell rule schema evaluated at render.

title: Display: align stored layout JSON to PRD screen_sets/cells schema
description: PRD phase-3 §1 layout JSON: stored component_positions (class-database-schema.php:1428) uses {column_start,row_start,width,height} grid coords, no screen_sets[]/cells[] nesting nor position {x,y,w,h}/style. Either align storage to PRD or update PRD to match implementation (decision needed).

title: Layout builder: implement or remove undo/redo (Ctrl+Z/Y stubs)
description: admin/assets/js/layout-builder.js:136-140 bind Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y to self.undo()/self.redo() which are undefined on TDWP_Layout_Builder -> silent JS errors. Implement a history stack or remove bindings. Found in tdwp-7qe audit.

title: Deepen stats-engine test coverage (richer $wpdb fake for recompute + transient invalidation)
description: StatsEngineTest currently covers only the robust surface (singleton, get_last_updated). get_dashboard_statistics and the get_total_* aggregates need the fake $wpdb to model poker_statistics/poker_tournament_players query results so recompute and transient-invalidation-on-save can be asserted without warnings. Extend TDWP_Fake_WPDB accordingly. Follow-up from tdwp-5n7.
close_reason: Modeled poker_statistics + poker_tournament_players in TDWP_Fake_WPDB; added wp_cache stubs; +7 StatsEngineTest cases (77 total). Merged in PR #29.

title: Remove diagnostic error_log spam from parser/domain-mapper/formula-validator (~80 lines)
description: Parser (class-parser.php), domain mapper (class-tdt-domain-mapper.php) and formula validator emit unconditional error_log() diagnostics during normal parsing/calculation (e.g. '=== v2.8.4 extract_game_history START ===', 'Poker Import - WARNING ...'). This is debug spam (violates the no-error_log-spam rule) and it forced beStrictAboutOutputDuringTests=false in phpunit.xml.dist. Gate behind Poker_Tournament_Import_Debug or remove. Then flip beStrictAboutOutputDuringTests back to true. The worst offenders (winnings 'ALWAYS log' block, round() debug) were already removed in the tdwp-5n7 PR.
close_reason: Removed ~90 diagnostic error_log calls from parser/mapper/formula-validator; flipped beStrictAboutOutputDuringTests=true; 70 tests green. Merged in PR #28.

title: AJAX security matrix for authenticated (priv) handlers (~100)
description: tdwp-vyz audited the 11 unauthenticated (nopriv) handlers - all clean. This covers the remaining ~100 wp_ajax (authenticated) registrations across poker-tournament-import.php, class-tournament-manager-ajax.php (already verify_request-guarded), class-display-manager.php, layout/prize/player/blind admin pages. Produce the nonce x capability x sanitization x escaping x prepare matrix and flag gaps. Lower priority: all require login. Split from tdwp-vyz.
close_reason: Audited authenticated AJAX surface: live-control verify_request-guarded (31), destructive cleaners cap+nonce, no user-input raw SQL. Fixed 1 gap: ajax_reconstruct_chronology now requires manage_options. v3.6.8.

title: Add per-IP rate-limiting to nopriv ajax_register_player
description: ajax_register_player (class-player-registration.php) is correctly guarded (nonce, honeypot, sanitization, status=pending) but has no rate-limiting. A bot with a valid public nonce that defeats the honeypot could spam pending player registrations. A global throttle transient (TDWP_Ajax_Guards::is_throttled) is wrong here - it would block legitimate concurrent registrations - so implement per-IP (or per-session) limiting. LOW severity; mitigated by honeypot + pending review. Found in tdwp-vyz nopriv audit.
close_reason: Added per-IP rate-limiting (TDWP_Ajax_Guards::is_rate_limited, REMOTE_ADDR-keyed, 5/hr default) to ajax_register_player + 3 tests. v3.6.8.

title: Integrate Expo controller + mobile-app with REST API
description: Wire controller/ (Fastify) and mobile-app/ (Expo) to the new REST API; reconcile the tdwp_ SQLite controller schema with the WP canonical schema.

title: Phase 4: Advanced rake & financial reporting
description: Sliding-scale/capped rake, financial dashboard, per-player ROI (poker_player_roi exists), venue profitability, tax exports vs PRD section 5.

title: Phase 4: Multi-monitor / advanced display
description: Multi-monitor support, seating chart blueprints, movement screen, screensaver/idle mode, remote-screen display API vs PRD section 1.

title: Phase 4: Hand timer & analytics
description: Per-hand timing, duration analytics, hand-based breaks, slow-play warnings. New table wp_poker_hand_history per PRD; not present today.

title: EPIC: Phase 4 Premium + REST API + Mobile
description: Phase 4 premium features + the REST API the PRD specifies + Expo controller/mobile-app integration.

title: Phase 3: Events & notifications (sounds, email/SMS, triggers)
description: Event trigger system, sound library + custom upload, email/SMS, priority queue, action hooks vs PRD section 2. Code: class-tournament-events.php.

title: Phase 3: Rules display (templates, multi-language)
description: Rules token editor, template library (Roberts/TDA/house), on-screen display, i18n vs PRD section 4.

title: Phase 3: Chip management (chipset, denominations, capacity)
description: Chipset designer, color/images, capacity calculator, starting-stack configurator, chip-up automation vs PRD section 3. No dedicated class found - likely a true gap.

title: Phase 3: League mgmt + player photos/badges
description: League management, player photos/avatars, stats dashboard, random draw, receipts/invoices, printable badges vs PRD section 5. Partial overlap with existing series-standings.

value: Live tournament stats surface in TWO legacy marts: poker_tournament_players (dashboard counts + per-player stats, joined to posts via postmeta tournament_uuid/player_uuid) AND poker_player_roi (the get_player_leaderboard/get_top_players panels read ONLY from ROI). Any writer of live results must populate BOTH. poker_player_roi has no unique key (only PRIMARY KEY id), so $wpdb->replace() never dedupes - use delete-then-insert on tournament_uuid. calculate_all_statistics() does NOT rebuild ROI. Live buy-in is NOT in _buy_in postmeta (importer-only); it lives on tdwp_tournament_templates.buy_in via tdwp_tournament_live_state.template_id (live_state has no buyin_amount column despite class-tdt-exporter.php:76 reading it - latent bug, see tdwp-ayg).

User grants standing per-LOOP authorization to squash-merge CI-green PRs the agent authors WITHOUT re-asking, but it is SCOPED TO THE SPECIFIC LOOP and does NOT carry across to a new /loop invocation. Re-ask at the start of each new loop. Granted: AJAX-security loop (2026-06-29), quality docs/ci/tests loop (2026-06-30), and the 'next bead' loop tdwp-swb error_log cleanup (2026-06-30).

When spawning sub-agents or workflows for this project, always use the lowest-cost model (prefer haiku, else sonnet) and the minimum reasoning effort needed for the task. User directive 2026-06-29; cost-sensitivity is high (session costs flagged).
